hero.tagline: We play loud. We play live.

about.title: About us
about.p1: SWAYDAY is a modern live band delivering high-energy shows covering everything from pop classics to the latest chart hits. We create an atmosphere that keeps your guests on the dance floor all night.
about.p2: With a wide repertoire and a passion for music, we guarantee an experience your guests will remember long after the last song — whether it's an intimate wedding or a big stage.

socials.title: Follow us
socials.subtitle: Stay updated with our latest news and upcoming shows

book.hero_subtitle: We play weddings, corporate events, and live concerts. Get in touch and let us make your evening unforgettable.
book.wedding_desc: Make your big day unforgettable with live music that sets the mood — from the ceremony to late-night dancing.
book.corporate_desc: Professional live entertainment that elevates your company party, after-work, or gala evening to the next level.
book.show_desc: High-energy live shows with the full band. Perfect for festivals, pubs, and event venues.
book.contact_subtitle: Interested in booking us? We reply quickly.
